memberdef.argsstring: (ServerCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, ServerSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< FServerApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > InServerApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: ServerMatchmaking

briefdescription.para: Enqueue Game Server to Joinable Session Queue. This will make this server joinable by other parties while already in a session.

parameterdescription.para: The session's data (get this data from QuerySessionStatus)
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return model FAccelByteModelsMatchmakingResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Dequeue Game Server from Joinable Session Queue. This will make this server not joinable to other parties while already in a session.

simplesect.para: If you're implementing the player count in the Server, call this once you treat the server as full already and don't want it to be used as matchmaking target for DSM.

parameterdescription.para: The match/session ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelName, FString const &MatchId, FString const &UserId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &PartyId=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: AddUserToSession

briefdescription.para: Add a user to session data.

parameterdescription.para: The Channel's Name.
match/session ID.
user ID to be added.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
optional, the party ID of the user to be added. if not listed user will be added to a new party.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChannelName, FString const &MatchId, FString const &UserId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FAccelByteModelsMatchmakingResult const &Body=FAccelByteModelsMatchmakingResult())
memberdef.name: RemoveUserFromSession

briefdescription.para: Remove a user from session data.

parameterdescription.para: The Channel's Name.
match/session ID.
user ID to be removed.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
optional, the session's data

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &MatchId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMatchmakingResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: QuerySessionStatus

parameterdescription.para: the match/session ID
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return model FAccelByteModelsMatchmakingResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &MatchId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMatchmakingResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RebalanceMatchmakingBasedOnMMR

parameterdescription.para: The match/session ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return model FAccelByteModelsMatchmakingResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &MatchId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMatchmakingResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, uint32 IntervalSec=5)
memberdef.name: ActivateSessionStatusPolling

briefdescription.para: Activate session data polling in a certain time interval.

parameterdescription.para: The match/session ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return model FAccelByteModelsMatchmakingResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.
the interval of every session data get call in second.

briefdescription.para: Matchmaking API to manage user's in-game profiles's matchmaking.
